zh.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Oliver Deincourt於大約1196年出生在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼時，他的父親Oliver de Eyncourt47歲，母親Lady Amabel de Plesley33歲。他於1242年5月之前與Matilda Peche在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他去世於1246年9月19日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oliver Deincourt于大约1196年出生在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼时，他的父亲Oliver de Eyncourt47岁，母亲Lady Amabel de Plesley33岁。他于1242年5月之前与Matilda Peche在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他去世于1246年9月19日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Oliver Deincourt was born about 1196, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Oliver de Eyncourt, was 47 and his mother, Lady Amabel de Plesley, was 33. He married Matilda Peche before May 1242, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. He died before 19 September 1246, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oliver Deincourt est né environ 1196, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Oliver d’Eyncourt, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Lady Amabel de Plesley, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Peche avant mai 1242, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé avant 19 septembre 1246, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Oliver Deincourt um 1196 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Oliver de Eyncourt 47 und seine Mutter Lady Amabel de Plesley 33. Er hat vor Mai 1242 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Peche geheiratet. Er starb vor 19. September 1246 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Deincourt è nato il circa 1196 nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Oliver de Eyncourt, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Lady Amabel de Plesley, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Peche prima del maggio 1242, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì prima del 19 settembre 1246, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver Deincourtが約1196年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで生まれた時，父Oliver de Eyncourtは47歳，母Lady Amabel de Plesleyは33歳であった。1242年5月以前にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでMatilda Pecheと結婚した。彼は1246年9月19日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Oliver Deincourt(이)가 대략 1196년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Oliver de Eyncourt(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Amabel de Plesley(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1242년 5월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Matilda Peche(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1246년 9월 19일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1196–before 19 September 1246: ойролцоогоор 1196 он–1246 оны Есдүгээр сарын 19–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Deincourt nasceu aproximadamente 1196, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Oliver de Eyncourt, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Lady Amabel de Plesley, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Peche antes maio de 1242, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu antes 19 de setembro de 1246, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oliver Deincourt родился около 1196 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Oliver de Eyncourt было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Amabel de Plesley, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Peche перед май 1242 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер перед 19 сентябрь 1246 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1196–before 19 September 1246: e tusa o le 1196–a'e le'I oo le 19 Setema 1246

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Oliver Deincourt nació aproximadamente 1196, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Oliver de Eyncourt, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Lady Amabel de Plesley, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Matilda Peche antes de mayo de 1242, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió antes de 19 de septiembre de 1246, en su pueblo.
